meaning: n.普里默斯炉(一种便携式汽化煤油炉)adj.第一的
examples: Nine months and 6,000 miles of pedalling, sleeping in a tent and cooking on a primus stove.
Primus Financial Chairman Robert Morse declined to comment when reached on his mobile phone.
Experienced observers of the debt market, such as Tom Jasper of Primus Guaranty, a credit insurer, think the crunch is far from over.
Her father will spend some of it on Primus, the beer of choice in Kinshasa.
The decision to move Linvoy Primus to right-back and let Kevin Harper loose on the right flank after the interval proved masterful.
